context_pointers.vague_reference: follow the pattern for unsupported vendor errors as defined in the utility layer

feature1_service_status.json.description: Checks service status responses and normalized failures from the status endpoint.

feature2_1_completion_vendors.json.description: Retrieves the list of available completion providers, including the empty-list case.

feature2_2_text_completion.json.description: Requests generated text from a supported provider and reports normalized validation errors for unsupported providers or blank prompts.

feature3_1_dataset_read.json.description: Reads dataset listings and individual dataset metadata through HTTP endpoints.

cases.expected_output:
http_method=GET
path=/api/v1/datasets
status_code=200
total=3
item_count=3
first_id=daab39ac-be9f-4de9-87c0-c4c94b297a97
first_filename=ds1.hf
first_format=job

feature3_2_dataset_write.json.description: Creates and deletes dataset records, including normalized not-found delete failures.

cases.expected_output:
http_method=POST
path=/api/v1/datasets
status_code=201
filename=test.hf
format=job
id=daab39ac-be9f-4de9-87c0-c4c94b297a97

feature4_1_job_create.json.description: Creates evaluation or inference jobs from accepted request fields and reports schema validation for unknown fields.

cases.expected_output:
http_method=POST
path=/api/v1/jobs/evaluate/
status_code=200
id=daab39ac-be9f-4de9-87c0-c4c94b297a97
name=test-job-001
status=created

http_method=POST
path=/api/v1/jobs/inference/
status_code=200
id=daab39ac-be9f-4de9-87c0-c4c94b297a97
name=test-job-001
status=created

feature4_2_job_read.json.description: Reads job collections and worker submission status, including normalized missing-submission failures.

cases.expected_output:
http_method=GET
path=/api/v1/jobs
status_code=200
total=3
item_count=3
first_id=daab39ac-be9f-4de9-87c0-c4c94b297a97
first_status=created

feature5_model_suggestions.json.description: Retrieves suggested model metadata for a task and normalizes invalid-task HTTP failures.

cases.expected_output:
http_method=GET
path=/api/v1/models/summarization
status_code=200
total=9
item_count=9
first_name=facebook/bart-large-cnn
first_uri=hf://facebook/bart-large-cnn

_constraints.output_rule: Print HTTP GET to /api/v1/health, status code 200, status, and deployment_type. If deployment_type is missing, print 'deployment_type=' (with no value).
Output line 'deployment_type=' with an empty value following it.

_constraints.input_condition: input.feature == 'service_status' and input.response.status != 'ok' or input.feature == 'service_status' and scenario == 'available_without_deployment_type'
_constraints.output_rule: Not explicitly defined as failure in test cases, but implied behavior for ok status without deployment_type is shown. If status is not ok, behavior not fully specified in provided tests but assumed to follow general status code rules unless specific.
Print HTTP GET to /api/v1/completions, status code 200, count (length of vendors list), and vendors (comma-separated). If empty, count=0 and vendors=.
Print vendors= with no value.

_constraints.input_condition: input.feature == 'text_completion' and input.vendors exists and input.vendor is in input.vendors and input.prompt is not empty
_constraints.output_rule: Print HTTP POST to /api/v1/completions/{vendor.slug}/, status code 200, and text=completion_text.

_constraints.input_condition: input.feature == 'text_completion' and input.vendor not in input.vendors
_constraints.output_rule: Print 'error=unsupported_vendor'.

_constraints.input_condition: input.feature == 'text_completion' and (input.prompt is empty or input.prompt is whitespace)
_constraints.output_rule: Print 'error=empty_prompt'.
Print HTTP GET to /api/v1/datasets, status code 200, total=3, item_count=3, first_id=<hex>, first_filename=ds1.hf, first_format=job.
Print HTTP GET to /api/v1/datasets, status code 200, total=0, item_count=0.

_constraints.input_condition: input.feature == 'dataset_read' and input.scenario == 'single' (implied by context of first item)
_constraints.output_rule: Not explicitly covered in provided test cases for single read, but expected output for list_full shows first_id, first_filename, first_format. If single record requested, likely follows similar extraction rules for those fields upon successful GET to /api/v1/datasets/{id}.
Print HTTP POST to /api/v1/datasets, status code 201, filename=input.filename, format=job, id=<generated-hex>.
Print HTTP DELETE to /api/v1/datasets/{id}, status code 200, deleted_id=<provided-id>.

_constraints.input_condition: input.feature == 'dataset_write' and (input.scenario == 'delete' and file does not exist or HTTP 404)
_constraints.output_rule: Print 'error=http_status' with status code 404.
Print HTTP POST to /api/v1/jobs/evaluate/, status code 200, id, name, status=created.
Print HTTP POST to /api/v1/jobs/inference/, status code 200, id, name, status=created.

_constraints.input_condition: input.feature == 'job_create' and input.job contains unknown fields
_constraints.output_rule: Print 'error=schema_validation' with failing field and category. Fields must not be accepted silently.
Print HTTP GET to /api/v1/jobs, status code 200, total=3, item_count=3, first_id, first_status=created.
Print HTTP GET to /api/v1/jobs, status code 200, total=0, item_count=0.
Print HTTP GET to /api/v1/health/jobs/{id}, status code 200, type=SUBMISSION, status=PENDING, submission_id.

_constraints.input_condition: input.feature == 'job_read' and submission lookup result is missing (404)
_constraints.output_rule: Print 'error=http_status', status_code=404, and response body if provided.
Print HTTP GET to /api/v1/models/{task}, status code 200, total=9, item_count=9, first_name, first_uri.
Print 'error=http_status', status_code=400.
Treated as empty prompt -> 'error=empty_prompt'.
Deliberate presence of 'deployment_type=' line with empty value is required even if not present in response JSON.
filename field in output must exactly match input.filename.
Only these two types are accepted; others trigger schema_validation error.
vendors field in output is comma-separated string. No quotes around values.

hide.replacement: a specific list of vendor names
a specific hex ID generated by the system
